pain_points.signal: Apps/platforms removing features without explanation or consistency (like repost button disappearing from some accounts but not others)
Technical glitches in devices/apps that disrupt daily usage
Poor compatibility between new accessories and older devices (like cases blocking ports, speakers not working with specific setups)
Setup complexity and cumbersome wires/cables
Devices not performing well during physical activity (like music players skipping songs while running)
Finding accurate information about compatibility and performance before purchase is difficult

desired_outcomes.outcome: Seamless, reliable app/device performance without unexpected changes or glitches
Easy setup and wireless convenience in accessories and devices
Devices that work perfectly during active use (like jogging)
Clear, consistent feature availability across accounts/platforms
High-quality sound/video without technical issues (like crackling, skipping, or poor picture)
Compatibility between new accessories/tech and older devices
